PROVE add_zero_right: ∀n. n + 0 = n
BEGIN
  ASSUME n : ℕ
  GOAL: n + 0 = n
  INDUCTION n
  PROVE BASE_CASE: n = 0
    SIMPLIFY LHS:
      0 + 0
      = 0 [BY plus_def]
    THEREFORE 0 + 0 = 0 [BY eq_refl]
    CONCLUDE: Base case holds [QED]
  PROVE INDUCTIVE_CASE: n = S m
    ASSUME m : ℕ
    INDUCTIVE_HYPOTHESIS ih: m + 0 = m
    SIMPLIFY LHS:
      S m + 0
      = S (m + 0) [BY plus_def]
    FACT h1: S (m + 0) = S m [BY f_equal ih]
    THEREFORE S m + 0 = S m [BY h1]
    CONCLUDE: Inductive case holds [QED]
  CONCLUDE: By induction on n, n + 0 = n for all n [QED]
END
